agent.name: Melissa Shaw
agent.bioShort: 23 years in West Linn real estate, more than $128 million sold since 2016, and over a thousand buyers and sellers served.
bio: Melissa consistently gets the job done, following through in a professional, friendly, and efficient manner. With 23 years of real estate experience, she has sold more than $128 million in home volume since 2016 and has served over a thousand buyers and sellers.

Detail-oriented, naturally attentive, and dedicated to problem-solving, Melissa employs keen negotiating skills and takes a proactive approach to ensure smooth transactions for her clients, always grounded in a deep understanding of her clients' unique personal and financial needs.

contact.hoursText: Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm. Saturday by appointment.

socialPending.label: Instagram
socialPending.note: Account reported spammed/disconnected. Re-add once reconnected.

compliance.license: Oregon Principal Broker and Washington Designated Broker. License numbers available on request.
compliance.dataSource: Market figures shown on this site are asking prices from active single-family and multi-family listings in ZIP 97068 (condos, townhomes, and manufactured homes excluded), refreshed monthly via RentCast; listing records originate from RMLS. Oregon is a non-disclosure state, so closed sale prices are not a matter of public record and are not displayed here; sold figures are available from Melissa directly. All information is deemed reliable but is not guaranteed and should be independently verified.
